summary: Comprehensive testing completed for UK Water Safety Map with all final features. Weather integration (Open-Meteo API), Sewage discharge incidents from water companies, Community reports, WebPush notification setup, and full mobile optimization all working perfectly.
passed_tests: Weather API returns current conditions with temperature, wind, humidity, UV index using Open-Meteo API (free, no key needed)
Weather API returns 3-day forecast with weather icons and temperature ranges
Weather tab in detail panel shows weather data and activity recommendation based on conditions
Sewage Alerts section shows active sewage discharges with company names (Thames Water, Yorkshire Water, United Utilities)
Sewage incidents appear as purple markers on the map with proper positioning
Sewage layer toggle shows/hides sewage markers functionality working
Community reports API endpoints work (GET returns reports, POST requires authentication)
Share report generates Twitter/Facebook share text with emojis, hashtags and social media URLs
Flood warnings from Environment Agency display in sidebar with 50 active warnings
WebPush notification endpoints properly configured with VAPID key support
All backend API endpoints returning correct response structures (44/44 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Station detail panel with Info/Weather/History tabs functioning correctly
Interactive Leaflet map with 100+ monitoring stations from Environment Agency
Bathing Waters section displaying beach locations with quality classifications (Good/Excellent)
Mobile responsive layout with collapsible sidebar and mobile menu button
Search functionality for postcodes and locations working properly
AI safety insights generation with fallback when API unavailable
Authentication-gated features properly protected (401 responses for unauthenticated requests)
Share functionality with copy-to-clipboard and social media integration
Historical data charts with 7-day water level trends and statistics
Real-time Environment Agency data integration for live water conditions
